title: rollandia calycina var. kaalae
intro: Rollandia calycina var. kaalae, also known as the Hawaiian ti plant, is a variety of ti plant native to the Hawaiian Islands. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rollandia calycina var. kaalae include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. This plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
